TLINE.TDLINE: This layout set is used for the QM results printout.
Report RQGAAM31 triggers the printout of this layout set; it
creates a separate printout for each inspection lot when the
command GET QALS LATE is carried out.
This text element contains the header information for an inspection lot
- Header with date, time and page no.
- Header area with general data about the inspection lot. The first
page of this area contains more information than the following page.
If company-code-dependent standard texts are maintained for the printing
- The header text is also printed in the header
- The address text is also printed in the header section on
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, PLKO (KNA1 / LFA1)
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTKO& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &SY-LANGU& PARAGRAPH S1
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTAB& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &SY-LANGU& PARAGRAPH S1
This information is only printed on the first page.
INCLUDE &TEXT_LO& OBJECT QPRUEFLOS ID QALS LANGUAGE &QALS-SPRACHE& PARAGRAPH ST
The footers are printed on every page.
If company-code-dependent standard texts are maintained for the printing
- The footer text is also printed on every page in the
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTFU& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &SY-LANGU& PARAGRAPH FU
This text element marks the end of an inspection lot.
If company-code-dependent standard texts are maintained for the printing
- The signature text is also printed on
INCLUDE &T001G-TXTUN& OBJECT TEXT ID ADRS LANGUAGE &SY-LANGU& PARAGRAPH EN
This text element prints the header of an inspection operation with
the corresponding number and short text.
ABAILABLE WORKAREAS FOR OPERATION COMPLETION: QAVE
This text element prints the header of an operation with the
This text element prints the header of an inspection operation with
the corresponding number and short text (for partial lots).
This text element prints the header of an operation with the
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO or QALTPO
This text element is only printed for operations w/o characteristics.
No characteristics exist for this operation.
This text element is only printed for operations w/o inspection points.
No inspection points exist for this operation.
This text element is only printed if no operations were selected for a
This text is printed if no partial lots were selected for a lot.
<F>No partial lots selected for this lot.</>
Characteristic header, independent of its type (qual./quant.), with
number, short text, status und attribute.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAMV, QAMR, TQ11, TQ11T,
INCLUDE &TEXT_CP& OBJECT QSS ID QM LANGUAGE &QAMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
INCLUDE &TEXT_CQ& OBJECT QPMERKMAL ID QPMT LANGUAGE &QAMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
Insp. description for charac. that do not belong to following lot types:
- lots for a delivery in SD (with partial lots)
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAMV, QAMR, QMKST
Case distinction for printing of texts
INCLUDE &TEXT_CH& OBJECT QEEMERKMAL ID QMEP LANGUAGE &QAMR-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
Valuation of characteristic, independent of type (qual./quant.)
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QAPO/QAMV/QAMR OR QAPO/QAPP/QAPMV/QAPSR/QAPSV OR
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QAPO/QAMV/QAMR OR QAPO/QAPP/QAPMV/QAPSR/QAPSV OR
Agreement of a local variable VORSCHUB that notes whether a
line feed has occured after the 'Details' text.
IF &QGRES-MITTELWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-MINWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-MAXWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-STANDARDAB& NE &SPACE&
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QAPO/QAMV/QAMR OR QAPO/QAPP/QAPMV/QAPSR/QAPSV OR
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QAPO/QAMV/QAMR OR QAPO/QAPP/QAPMV/QAPSR/QAPSV OR
Start of inspection point header section
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS for this section: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAPP, QALT.
Additional header information for which the details are printed.
This element is printed after a space following the last detail.
INCLUDE &TEXT_TL& OBJECT QALT ID LTXT LANGUAGE &QALS-SPRACHE& PARAGRAPH ST
Inspection point header for partial lots; all other text elements as in
End of inspection point header section
Characteristic header (insp. pt.), independent of type (qual./quant.).
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAPP, QAPMV, QAPSR, QAPSV
INCLUDE &TEXT_CP& OBJECT QSS ID QM LANGUAGE &QAPMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
INCLUDE &TEXT_CQ& OBJECT QPMERKMAL ID QPMT LANGUAGE &QAPMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
Inspection description for characteristics that belong to an inspection
Note: This text element was renamed.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAPP, QAPMV, QAPSR, QAPSV
INCLUDE &TEXT_IP& OBJECT QEEPROBE ID QPRP LANGUAGE &QAPSR-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
This text element is only printed for insp. points w/o characteristics.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QAPO, QAPP
No characteristics exist for this inspection point
INCLUDE &TEXT_TL& OBJECT QALT ID LTXT LANGUAGE &QALS-SPRACHE& PARAGRAPH ST
Characteristic header (partial lots), independent of type (qual./quant.)
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QALT, QALTPO, QALTPPMV, QALTPPSR,
INCLUDE &TEXT_CP& OBJECT QSS ID QM LANGUAGE &QALTPPMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
INCLUDE &TEXT_CQ& OBJECT QPMERKMAL ID QPMT LANGUAGE &QALTPPMV-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
Inspection description for characteristics in the partial lot view.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QALTPO, QALTPP,
Case distinction for the printing of texts
INCLUDE &TEXT_PL& OBJECT QEEPROBE ID QPRP LANGUAGE &QALTPPSR-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QAVT, QGRES, QALT
INCLUDE &TEXT_UD_PL& OBJECT QPRUEFLOS ID QAVE LANGUAGE &QALS-SPRACHE& PARAGRAPH ST
INCLUDE &TEXT_UD& OBJECT QPRUEFLOS ID QAVE LANGUAGE &QALS-SPRACHE& PARAGRAPH ST
Beginning of section that prints defects at lot level.
End of defect section at the lot level.
Beginning of section that prints defects at operation level.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QALS, QGRES, QMFEL, QAPO or QALTPO
End of defect section at operation level
Beginning of section that prints defects at characteristic level.
AVAILABLE WORKAREAS: QAPO/QAMV/QAMR OR QAPO/QAPP/QAPMV/QAPSR/QAPSV OR
Note: Since the limit for the name of a text element is 30 characters,
Note: Since the limit for the name of a text element is 30 characters,
Note: Since the limit for the name of a text element is 30 characters,
End of defects section at characteristic level.
Start of section that prints single values and classed values
- QASK OR QAS1 OR QAPS1 OR QALTPPS1
Differentiation of cases for printing texts
INCLUDE &TEXT_KL& OBJECT QEEKLASSE ID QKLP LANGUAGE &QAKL-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
INCLUDE &TEXT_EW& OBJECT QEEESTUECK ID QESP LANGUAGE &QASE-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
Start of the section that prints values for a sample
QALS, QGRES, QMKST, QAPO, QAMV, QAMR, QASV, QASR
Header of the sample for the characteristic (independent of type Qual./
Quant.) with number, short text, status and attribute
INCLUDE &TEXT_SA& OBJECT QEEPROBE ID QPRP LANGUAGE &QASR-LTEXTSPR& PARAGRAPH ST
IF &QGRES-MITTELWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-MINWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-MAXWERT& NE &SPACE& OR &QGRES-STANDARDAB& NE &SPACE&
,,Mean value of the valid measured values,, ,,&QGRES-MITTELWERT&,, &QGRES-MASSEINHSW&
